ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of exchange (e.g., stock exchange, futures exchange) */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the symbol is listed */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "symbol_type" TEXT /* Type of symbol (e.g., stock, future, option) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the symbol (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the symbol (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol for which the data is recorded */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the symbol on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the symbol on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the symbol on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the symbol on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the symbol on the given date */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* Open interest of the symbol on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the symbol on the given date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid by the symbol on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio of the symbol on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol subscribed to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the symbol is listed */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date of subscription */,
  "unsubscribe_date" TEXT /* Date of unsubscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "trading_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the session is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trading session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trading session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, extended) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "market_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market event */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the event occurred */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the market event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of market event (e.g., earnings report, merger announcement) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the market event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the market event (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_events_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol for which the indicator is calculated */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the symbol is listed */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe of the technical indicator (e.g., 1-minute, 1-hour) */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date of calculation of the technical indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol for which the chart is created */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the symbol is listed */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line chart, candlestick chart) */,
  "chart_data" TEXT /* Data of the chart (e.g., image, chart data) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date of creation of the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol for which the model is trained */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the symbol is listed */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Data of the machine learning model (e.g., model weights, hyperparameters) */,
  "trained_date" TEXT /* Date of training of the machine learning model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model that made the prediction */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol for which the prediction is made */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the symbol is listed */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the symbol */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV file, database) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key of the data source */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret of the data source */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the data source */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "data_feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source that provides the data feed */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol for which the data feed is provided */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the symbol is listed */,
  "data_feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed (e.g., 1-minute, 1-hour) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "integration_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration log */,
  "data_feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed that was integrated */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date of the integration */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the integration failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_data_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("data_feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_status" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id", "status_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_status" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the symbol (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id", "status_date")
)
